resume.summary: Full-Stack Engineer with 5 years of experience specializing in building scalable web applications, reusable design systems, and automated data lifecycles. Specializing in React, TypeScript, and Node.js, with a proven track record of migrating high-traffic properties to headless architectures and deploying real-time database synchronization pipelines. Experienced in cross-platform mobile development and integrating context-aware AI utilities to improve developer and user workflows.

experience.title: Software Developer
desc: Streamline database synchronization for 5+ enterprise properties, maintaining 100% data integrity across multi-tenant environments through optimized update cycles.
Architect high-conversion user flows and lead capture systems integrated with Salesforce and Genesys, directly facilitating data ingestion and sales routing.
Engineer reusable UI components and scalable design systems to improve page performance and maintain strict WCAG 2.1 AA compliance and accessibility standards.

Accelerate feature delivery velocity in an Agile environment by configuring ESLint/Prettier infrastructure and iterating on Git-based workflows and CI/CD deployment pipelines to reduce release friction.

experience.title: Web Developer
desc: Modernized data architecture by deploying custom Node.js APIs to bridge BI platforms with headless CMS, transitioning data from manual quarterly cycles to real-time synchronization with 100% data freshness.
Built high-performance WebGL data visualizations for AI products, programmatically rendering localized engagement metrics for 1,000+ global coordinates.
Led the migration of high-traffic blog properties to a headless CMS stack (React, Gatsby, GraphQL), resulting in a 20% reduction in load times and highly optimized Core Web Vitals.
Served as primary technical liaison for Product and SEO teams, translating complex engineering blockers into actionable technical specifications, documentation, and scalable code design.
Integrated scalable Node.js APIs with third-party engagement widgets to enhance frontend functionality and SEO data exposure across distributed systems.

experience.title: Technical Marketing Coordinator
desc: Automated content workflows by building a custom Node.js application integrated with Google APIs, reducing manual effort by 10x and accelerating delivery by 50%.
Engineered internal SEO audit tools using Python and Node.js to automate site-wide integrity checks, reducing broken links by 30% and duplicate content by 25%.
Collaborated with E-Commerce and Technical SEO teams to ensure proper instrumentation for tracking and performance monitoring using custom logging and dashboards.

experience.title: Resident Analyst
desc: Extracted key data elements from B2B client databases to enable data-driven personalization and engagement insights.
Built responsive landing pages and automation workflows using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.
Translated user requirements into CRM integrations and data migration initiatives.
